behavior_summary: When the U8P_AFTERNEC::hatch event runs (U8P_AFTERNEC::hatch), the script marks a related in-game object with a specific info/state key (0x0210) and excludes that object from further engine processing.
The script sets the global flag 'talkedToDeadDudes' to true, recording quest/dialog progress.
The item instance passed into the event (the U8P_AFTERNEC::hatch item) is destroyed via Item::destroy as part of cleanup.
notable_control_flow: Apply engine-level set-info (id 0x0210) to a target object derived from the passed-in item, then call process-exclude on that same target.
Call Item::destroy on the item parameter and return.
Loop/frame progression inside U8P_AFTERNEC::hatch; treated as control-flow, not explicit internal call.
open_questions: What concrete game-state or behavior is represented by info id 0x0210 (semantic meaning is inferred but not explicit).
Exactly which object reference is targeted by the set-info/process-exclude sequence (the code derives it indirectly from the passed-in item; the relationship is inferred).
What specific in-game trigger(s) fire Event 7 ('U8P_AFTERNEC::hatch') in gameplay (area entry vs. item/creature hatching remains uncertain).

main_function.name: U8P_AFTERNEC::hatch
main_function.purpose: Handle a U8P_AFTERNEC::hatch-related event by marking a related object with info id 0x0210, excluding that object from further processing, recording that the player 'talked to dead dudes', and destroying the U8P_AFTERNEC::hatch item.
entry_conditions: Event 7 (U8P_AFTERNEC::hatch) — invoked by the engine when the U8P_AFTERNEC::hatch event is triggered for the item/process.

function_map.name: U8P_AFTERNEC::hatch
function_map.role: Event handler for the U8P_AFTERNEC::hatch event; coordinates state change, global flag write, and item destruction.

function_map.name: Item::destroy
function_map.role: Remove/destroy the item instance passed to U8P_AFTERNEC::hatch.

function_map.name: U8P_AFTERNEC::set info + process exclude
function_map.role: Engine operations invoked to set info id 0x0210 on a referenced object and then exclude that object from normal processing/AI.

external_calls.purpose: Set info id 0x0210 on a target object derived from the item parameter and then exclude that object from further engine processing (likely to change state and stop AI/updates).
Destroy/remove the item instance passed into the U8P_AFTERNEC::hatch handler as cleanup.

writes.name: talkedToDeadDudes
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 to record that the player has 'talked to dead dudes' (progress/quest/dialog flag).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: When the U8P_AFTERNEC::hatch event runs (U8P_AFTERNEC::hatch), the script marks a related in-game object with a specific info/state key (0x0210) and excludes that object from further engine processing.
